productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Top
description: Composition Blue top made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with a panel stitched at the cuffs, a spread collar, half buttoned placket, two pockets on the chest covered with a flap and contrast stitch detailing on the sides and above the hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryFor the understated yet stylish vibe, wear this basic united colors of benetton top. Styled with the label's classic high fashion sense, this piece is an off-duty essential. Layer this with a blazer with exaggerated shoulders, and a scarf. Slip into suede lace-up formal boots to complete your ensemble.Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
